name: tiny-eventsource
description: Server-Sent Events (SSE) EventEmitter for streaming to HTTP clients

scripts.build: npm run lint && rm -rf dist && npm run rollup
scripts.fix: npx oxlint --fix *.js src test && npx oxfmt *.js src test --write
scripts.lint: npx oxlint *.js src test && npx oxfmt *.js src test --check
scripts.coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage --test-coverage-exclude=dist/** --test-coverage-exclude=test/** --test-reporter=spec test/**/*.js 2>&1 | grep -A 1000 "start of coverage report" > coverage.txt

author: Jason Mulligan <jason.mulligan@avoidwork.com>
